## VersionedPlugins type

Map of protocol versions to plugin implementations. Each protocol version can provide a different plugin implementation.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type VersionedPlugins = Record<number, PluginCommand>
```

**References:** [PluginCommand](./stripe-cli-plugin-bootstrap.plugincommand.md)

## Example

```ts
const versionedPlugins: VersionedPlugins = {
  1: new PluginV1(),
  2: new PluginV2(),
  3: new PluginV3(),
}
```
